data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the algorithm's implementation.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of an algorithm that hides 20-40% of actual open slots, but the evidence does not demonstrate that such an algorithm is implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case describes the intended behavior but does not provide concrete evidence of the algorithm's operation or its effectiveness in hiding the specified percentage of slots. The evidence provided focuses on other aspects of the system without addressing the specific hiding algorithm requirement.
gaps: No evidence of the algorithm that hides 20-40% of actual open slots.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
